ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is an automated notification from your bank regarding a recent debit transaction on your account.

- Date: 2026-04-12
- Amount: $1,234.56
- Merchant: XYZ Retailers

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this activity, please review your account and contact our support team immediately by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Scholarship Award Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! The University Scholarship Committee has awarded you a scholarship of $10,000 for the upcoming academic year. To finalize the award, we require your confirmation and a nominal processing fee of $50.

Please click the link below to securely submit your banking details and complete the transaction:

<URL>

You must complete this process within 48 hours to secure your scholarship. Failure to do so may result in the award being revoked.

Act now to avoid losing this opportunity.

Best regards,
Scholarship Office
University of Excellence
